External Agent: 
Based on your request for a more robust and comprehensive insurance solution, here are a few premium options that might best suit an active lifestyle with substantial health, property, and travel needs:

1. Enhanced Health Coverage:
   • Physical Health: The PrimeCare Premium Plan offers extensive coverage with zero deductibles, access to telemedicine, gym and wellness programs, plus dedicated agents available 24/7. It’s rated at 5-star quality with a premium of €200/month.
   • Mental Health: Matching with the PrimeCare Premium Plan for mental health means you will receive 24/7 crisis support and dedicated coordination, at €130/month.
   
2. Property Protection:
   • For your active lifestyle, consider the EliteHome Premium Coverage which offers luxury item coverage with concierge claim service and enhanced protection. This plan is available at €95/month.

3. Travel Coverage:
   • To bundle with your active lifestyle and ensure full travel protection, the EliteTravel Premium Plan provides private jet protection along with luxury accommodations and global support. It is offered at €110/month.

4. Additional Services:
   • For advanced sports injury and wellness protection, you might consider add-ons such as the Wellness Programs (at €200/month)
